title: MantraRaj Pink Chrome Makeup Brush Set 5Pcs Personal Make Up Brush Kit Beauty Powder Angled Foundation Brush Foundation Concealer Eyeshadow Lipstick Brush Great Present For Christmas And Birthdays
features: This pink chrome makeup brush set would make a great present for Christmas and birthdays. The set contains x5 makeup brushes all for a variety of daily personal uses to make the application of makeup easier.
The set includes : x1 powder brush, x1 angled foundation brush, x1 foundation and concealer brush x1 eyeshadow brush x1 lipstick brush.

Ideal For Gift : Intended for makeup beginners and enthusiasts the makeup brush kit is easy to use and superior in quality at an affordable price, with a complete assortment to allow you to keep your makeup. Selected gift for mom, wife, or female friends.
Each brush has ombre bristles from white to pink with electroplated rose gold handles.
With natural makeup, create a smooth and meticulous effect, your makeup is a good helper.
